title: GatewayTransferNative.onCall deducts platform fee but swaps using gross amount
reason: Duplicate of F-001 root cause (swap spend parameters are not reconciled to net available balance after fee transfer).

title: GatewaySend callback return type is ABI-incompatible with authenticated gateway callback flow
reason: Current implementation returns `bytes4(0)` (`return ""`), which decodes as empty `bytes` for the gateway call path; deterministic callback DoS is not supported by the code as written.

title: Unchecked inbound ERC20 transferFrom in GatewaySend.onCall allows underfunded payouts
reason: Already covered by F-005 (destination `onCall` trusts payload values and ignores/does not enforce inbound transfer success semantics).

title: Refund claim event emits zero token/amount because storage is deleted before emit
reason: Informational telemetry issue only; does not create protocol-level fund loss/theft/lockup by itself.

title: Deadline parameter not enforced in swap operations
reason: `deadline` is forwarded to DODO `mixSwap`; enforcement is in the router call. No distinct in-scope vulnerability established in these gateway contracts.
